operations.content:
## D-0023
Every repository boot must produce a standardized Boot Report. Boot success is determined by loading repository state rather than by subjective interpretation.

# Boot Report Protocol

## Purpose

Every new LLM session must produce the same structured report after executing BOOT.md.

## Boot Report Template

```
BOOT REPORT

Repository Loaded: YES/NO

Constitution Loaded: YES/NO

Decisions Loaded: YES/NO

Current Context Loaded: YES/NO

Current Phase:

Current Objective:

Next Required Action:

Confidence:
```

## Rule

The report must be generated before proposing new work.
